subject: [RFC PATCH v4 12/27] mm/migrate: NP_OPS_MIGRATION - support private node user migration

reviews.author: Gregory Price
reviews.summary: Identified a need for private node services to support user-driven migration. Proposed adding NP_OPS_MIGRATION flag and folio_managed_user_migrate() wrapper to enable migrate_pages syscall targeting private nodes.

2026-02-22.patch_summary: This patch series introduces support for private node user migration, allowing data movement between regular and private nodes. It adds a new flag NP_OPS_MIGRATION and a folio_managed_user_migrate() wrapper to dispatch migration requests. Private nodes can opt-in to support user-driven migration by setting the flag and providing a custom migrate_to callback.
